name: leerness
description: Leerness: Context Routing, Writeback Policy, AX 마이그레이션/신규설치 가이드로 AI가 적재적소의 프로젝트 메모리를 읽고 갱신하게 하는 AX 최적화 개발 하네스.

scripts.test: node ./bin/harness.js --help && node ./bin/harness.js route release && node ./bin/harness.js init --yes --skills office,commerce-api,ai-verified-skill-publisher ./tmp-harness-test && node ./bin/harness.js status ./tmp-harness-test && node ./bin/harness.js skill list && node ./bin/harness.js skill info ai-verified-skill-publisher && node ./bin/harness.js library guide ./tmp-harness-test && node ./bin/harness.js verify ./tmp-harness-test

author: gugu9999gu
